narrative:
Cardington Township has 2,087 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.1 percentage points.
